title: OPGC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Additional General Manager Posts
description: The Odisha Power Generation Corporation (OPGC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Additional General Manager Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBA, PGDM, B.E./B. Tech in Mechanical, Electrical, Civil Engineering can apply for the OPGC Notification 2026 . Interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the e...
